label: 278b Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–426, title VII, § 701(b)92 Stat. 991Oct. 7, 1978
notes: Section, , , related to a report to Congress of the operation and work of the laboratory, including the statement of the receipts and expenditures, such a report to cover a fiscal year period ending on June 30 of the calendar year immediately preceding the convening of each such session. Similar provisions were contained in the following prior acts:act June 28, 1944, ch. 294, title I58 Stat. 402
